title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A story of money, love, and the American Dream in the Roaring Twenties.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: A landmark volume in science writing by one of the great minds of our time.

title: The Diary of a Young Girl
author: Anne Frank
description: The poignant and deeply moving writings from the Dutch-language diary kept by Anne Frank.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: Yuval Noah Harari explores the history of humankind from the evolutionary stages to the modern day.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: The epic science fiction masterpiece set on the desert planet Arrakis.

title: Charlotte's Web
author: E.B. White
description: The classic children's story about a pig named Wilbur and his spider friend Charlotte.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: A deep dive into the two systems that drive the way we think.
